response_raw:
{
"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To deal with fake content on social media, it is essential to be aware of the tactics used by fake accounts and bots. One way to do this is by using fact-checking tools provided by social media platforms. Additionally, users can report suspicious content to the platform's moderators. Furthermore, users can also use third-party fact-checking apps to verify the authenticity of the content they encounter on social media. By being proactive and vigilant in identifying and reporting fake content, individuals can help create a safer and more trustworthy online community.",

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To deal with fake content on social media, it is essential to be aware of the tactics used by fake accounts and bots. One way to do this is by using fact-checking tools provided by social media platforms. Additionally, users can report suspicious content to the platform's moderators. Furthermore, users can also use third-party fact-checking apps to verify the authenticity of the content they encounter on social media. By being proactive and vigilant in identifying and reporting fake content, individuals can help create a safer and more trustworthy online community.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to be aware of the tactics used by fake accounts and bots. By using fact-checking tools provided by social media platforms, reporting suspicious content to moderators, and employing third-party fact-checking apps, individuals can help create a safer and more trustworthy online community.
